hyper.tooltip: Context-aware formatting that adapts to your active app. Fixes punctuation, capitalization, and minor grammar while keeping your original wording. Automatically applies email formatting in mail apps.
hyper.preview: AI cleans up punctuation, capitalization, and minor grammar mistakes while preserving your original words. Adapts formatting based on your active app — automatically applies email structure when composing in a mail client.
hyper.description: Context-aware formatting that adapts to your active app. Fixes punctuation, capitalization, and minor grammar while keeping your original wording. Automatically applies email formatting in mail apps.

message.tooltip: Message mode cleans up your dictated message, fixing punctuation, turning into paragraphs and sorting out grammatical errors.
message.preview: AI restructures your dictation into a clean message with proper paragraphs, punctuation, and grammar corrections.
message.description: Casual, conversational style for chat apps

mail.tooltip: Email mode formats your dictation into a professional email structure, with proper salutations, paragraphing, and sign-off.
mail.preview: AI formats your dictation into a professional email with salutations, structured paragraphs, and a sign-off.

note.tooltip: Note mode organizes your dictated content into a clear note format with headers, bullet points, and structured sections.
note.preview: AI organizes your dictation into structured notes with headers, bullet points, and clear sections.

meeting.tooltip: Meeting mode structures your dictation into meeting minutes format with attendees, action items, and key discussion points.
meeting.preview: AI structures your dictation into meeting minutes with attendees, discussion points, and action items.

code.tooltip: Code mode converts spoken programming dictation into code syntax. Say 'open bracket', 'backslash', 'camel case' and more to write code by voice.
code.preview: AI converts spoken programming dictation into code syntax, interpreting commands like 'open bracket' and 'camel case'.

custom.tooltip: Custom mode allows you to define your own formatting rules and prompts for specific use cases.
custom.preview: Uses your custom formatting instructions to process the transcription.
